columns.extraction_plan: The primary description of the therapy types is found in the "Abstract" under "Design, setting, and participants" on page 1: "Randomized phase 3 trial of ADT plus D versus ADT alone in 385 mNCPC patients". Further details are provided in the "Patients and methods" section on page 2, first paragraph: "Eligible patients were randomized in a 1:1 ratio to ADT plus D (75 mg/m² for 21 d, up to nine cycles) or ADT alone. ADT consisted of orchiectomy or luteinizing hormone-releasing hormone agonists, alone or combined with nonsteroidal androgen receptor inhibitors."
